mapper.select: SELECT REVIEW_ID AS reviewId, PRODUCT_ID AS productId, PLATFORM_REVIEW_ID AS platformReviewId, RATING AS rating, REVIEW_TEXT AS reviewText, TO_CHAR(REVIEW_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS reviewDate, REVIEWER_SKIN_TYPE AS reviewerSkinType, REVIEWER_SKIN_CONCERN AS reviewerSkinConcern, SENTIMENT_LABEL AS sentimentLabel, SENTIMENT_ID AS sentimentId, TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate FROM BL_REVIEWS WHERE PRODUCT_ID = #{_parameter} ORDER BY REVIEW_ID DESC

SELECT REVIEW_ID AS reviewId, PRODUCT_ID AS productId, PLATFORM_REVIEW_ID AS platformReviewId, RATING AS rating, REVIEW_TEXT AS reviewText, TO_CHAR(REVIEW_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS reviewDate, REVIEWER_SKIN_TYPE AS reviewerSkinType, REVIEWER_SKIN_CONCERN AS reviewerSkinConcern, SENTIMENT_LABEL AS sentimentLabel, SENTIMENT_ID AS sentimentId, TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate FROM BL_REVIEWS WHERE PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} AND SENTIMENT_LABEL = #{sentimentLabel} ORDER BY REVIEW_ID DESC
